ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county (FIPS code) */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Current population of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "county_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county's centroid */,
  "county_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county's centroid */,
  "county_established" TEXT /* Date the county was established */,
  "county_website" TEXT /* Official website of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "theme_category" TEXT /* Category of the theme */,
  "theme_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "theme_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county the dataset belongs to */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme the dataset belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the dataset */,
  "theme_range" TEXT /* Range of values for the theme */,
  "data_year" INTEGER /* Year of the dataset */,
  "data_month" INTEGER /* Month of the dataset */,
  "data_day" INTEGER /* Day of the dataset */,
  "data_source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the source belongs to */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the source */,
  "source_last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_creator" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the version */,
  "version_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
